name: Lemon Coolers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix, cool whip, and egg well with your hands until combined.
2. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into a bowl of powdered sugar and coat evenly.
3. Shape the coated mixture into balls.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 to 12 minutes. Do not overbake.
5. Remove from the oven when done baking and allow to cool completely before serving.
